title: Industrially Plated
body:
Industrially Plated is a deco mod that adds many metallic blocks for building factories, futuristic buildings, secret labs, and whatever else you might think to use them for!

As of now, the mod has:
- Plating blocks and variants
  - Can be dyed into any of Minecraft's 16 dye colors!
- Hazard stripe blocks
- Signage
  - 4 different types, each with a lot of different signs (you can rotate and flip some if you right click), also the fire diamond
  - Use it for decor, adding a bit more realism to your factory, or maybe on servers to actually tell other players what to or not to do

![All blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4WFmfeR9/images/4c0d585ce742b05950204a79d91cfb3cbd4af51e.png)

More stuff is coming... at some point. No promises.
